name: Code Heart's TurtleScript
description: Code Heart's TurtleScript is a JavaScript-like language with several turtle-graphics-like functions and several colour names predefined.  I mention Code Heart mainly to distinguish his language from KTurtle's TurtleScript which is a lot more similar to Logo.

commands.description: Draw an arc around the turtle, without moving the turtle. The angle is relative to the current heading.  We should test if WebLogo's arc command is a good translation for CodeHeart's arc.  It looks good from the documentation but maybe the start and end angles are different.

Clears the screen to the specified color.  The colour can be specified as 1 or 3 arguments.  1 single colour argument or red, green, blue values.  Translating to a setScreenColor and some WebLogo command to clear the drawing might work.
Returns the current scale number.  The same scale is set using setScale.
Translates to either left or arcLeft in WebLogo depending on how many arguments are specified.
Returns a random real number in the specified range
Translates to either right or arcRight in WebLogo depending on how many arguments are specified.
Translates to setPenColor but the color might be expressed by 1, 3, or 4 parameters.
Scales all distances (but not x and y coordinates or pen width) by this factor. Useful for reusing drawing commands for different size objects. 1.0 is the default scale.
Sets the number of commands executed before showing the next frame of animation.
Translates to a setFillColor and polyStart
Waits for the specified number of seconds
